hero.title: The coaching platform that watches over every client.
hero.subtitle: Programs, check-ins, metrics and messaging — in one calm, focused workspace built for coaches who care. Free for everyone.

features.title: Everything you need to coach with confidence
features.subtitle: From programming to compliance — Owl Performance gives you a wide-eyed view of every client.

programs.title: Programs & workouts
programs.desc: Build periodised programs once, assign and adapt per client in seconds.

compliance.title: Compliance you can see
compliance.desc: 7- and 30-day compliance scores surface clients who need a check-in.

messaging.title: Real-time messaging
messaging.desc: Talk to clients without juggling WhatsApp threads and screenshots.

metrics.title: Body metrics & habits
metrics.desc: Weight, photos, sleep, mood — tracked and trended automatically.

library.title: Smart exercise library
library.desc: Reuse exercises with video, cues and load history per athlete.

mobile.title: Client mobile app
mobile.desc: Your clients log workouts and check-ins from a polished mobile experience.

one.title: Invite your client
one.desc: Send a single link — they sign up in under a minute.

two.title: Build their program
two.desc: Drag, drop, duplicate. Reuse blocks across clients.

three.title: Coach with clarity
three.desc: Compliance, messages and metrics in one calm dashboard.

items.q: Can I import my existing clients?
items.a: Yes — invite them by email or share a single sign-up link. Their existing programs can be uploaded in bulk.

items.q: Do my clients need an app?
items.a: Yes — they get a polished mobile app on iOS and Android, free of charge.
Owl Performance is completely free. No tiers, no upsells — just coaching software.

cta.title: Ready to coach with clarity?
cta.subtitle: Join coaches using Owl Performance to keep every client on track.
